title: Better 3D Mace
description: Better 3D Mace in 1.21. It remodels the mace to appear in 3D. Additionally, this resource pack changes the appearance of a regular mace to an iron mace.
body: From the beginning of the release of version 1.21, I had a thought related to this update. We're talking about the Mace, the newest weapon added to the new structure included in this update. I thought about changing the overall look of the mace. So, I decided to remodel the mace to appear in 3D and change the appearance of a regular mace to an iron mace. And that's how this texture pack was created. First Inspiration https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/3d-mace-6221732/ Second Inspiration https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/metal-pipe-falling-sound-for-mace/
